prompt: Create a 1:1 square rounded app icon logo featuring Lumi, a cute arctic fox mascot, in a soft anime cartoon style. Reference style: modern mascot app icons with a character peeking from the lower-right corner, oversized cute face, simple bold silhouette, glossy 2.5D polish, clean rounded-square tile, high readability at tiny sizes. Composition: Lumi is a white and cream arctic fox half-body in the lower-right corner, occupying 50-62% of the canvas, visible head, fluffy cheeks, small paws, rounded ears, tiny black nose, bright friendly eyes, subtle pink cheeks. Background: sea-salt cheese palette only, #C2DEF5, #FAFADB, #73B4E9, #3A86C5, soft cream-blue gradient, no letters, no P mark, no symbol mark, no text. Style: fresh, gentle, elegant, clean, cute but not noisy; crisp edges, soft shadow, light/dark mode recognizable. Constraints: no words, no watermark, no typography, no chip, no semiconductor, no circuit board, no black corner artifacts, no heavy outline, no realistic fur, no busy scenery.

Create a 1:1 square rounded app icon logo featuring Lumi, a cute arctic fox mascot, in a two-dimensional anime cartoon style. Reference style: adorable app mascot close-up icons, big expressive eyes, rounded simple shapes, clean tile background, soft 2.5D lighting. Composition: close-up arctic fox face and chest centered slightly low, occupying 58-68% of canvas, very readable silhouette, fluffy white fur simplified into smooth rounded tufts, small paws near bottom edge, ears fully visible, gentle smile, blush cheeks. Palette: sea-salt cheese colors #C2DEF5, #FAFADB, #73B4E9, #3A86C5, white fur, minimal dark eyes and nose, tiny pink blush only. Background: full-canvas rounded-square tile with soft blue-cream gradient and a small restrained star sparkle, no text and no letter-like shapes. Designed for tiny app icon clarity on light and dark mode. Avoid words, watermark, typography, P letter, chip, semiconductor, circuit motifs, black borders, black corners, complex scenery, realistic fur.
